summary: Clear, high‑quality audience recording praised as the best of its kind
review: The sole review rates this audience (AUD) tape five stars, noting it sounds clearer than other AUD recordings and is the best they’ve heard. No musical performance details are provided, but the recording quality is highlighted as excellent.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive review focusing on recording clarity; lack of show commentary limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says it sounds the best among AUDs and is a little clearer, indicating very good clarity and balance for an audience source.
